scripts.kill-port: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{const pid=execSync('netstat -ano | findstr :3000').toString().trim().split(/\s+/).pop();execSync('taskkill /PID '+pid+' /F');console.log('Killed PID '+pid)}catch(e){console.log('Port 3000 is free')}"
scripts.fresh: npm run kill-port && npm run dev
